final:
module RefModule(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire [3:0] temperature,  
    output reg high_temp_signal  
);  

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
    if (reset) begin  
        high_temp_signal <= 0;  
    end else begin  
        if (temperature > 4'b1010) // 10 in binary  
            high_temp_signal <= 1;  
        else  
            high_temp_signal <= 0;  
    end  
end  
endmodule
